title: Manual Lock/Unlock User Accounts
description: The system shall provide an interface for admins to manually lock or unlock user accounts.
rationale: Admins need the ability to control user access and security by locking or unlocking accounts as needed.
business_value: Enhances security and compliance with organizational policies, reducing unauthorized access risks.

source.description: As an admin I need to manually lock or unlock user accounts So that I can control user access and security

acceptance_criteria: Given I am an authenticated admin on the user management page
When I select a user account and choose to lock it
Then the account status changes to 'locked' and the user cannot log in
Given I am an authenticated admin on the user management page
When I select a locked user account and choose to unlock it
Then the account status changes to 'active' and the user can log in again
preconditions: Admin is authenticated with proper authorization
postconditions: Selected user account status is updated to 'locked'
Selected locked user account status is updated to 'active'
functional_constraints: The lock/unlock functionality must be available within the user management interface
Locking an account prevents any login or actions performed by the user
security_requirements: Authentication mechanism for admins must comply with organizational security standards
Access control to the user management page should follow role-based access controls (RBAC)

non_functional_requirements.performance: System should respond within 500ms for lock/unlock operations
non_functional_requirements.scalability: System should be able to handle up to 1,000 active users without performance degradation
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages should be clear and actionable

edge_cases: What happens if an admin attempts to lock their own account?
How does the system handle simultaneous lock/unlock operations for the same user?
What is the behavior when trying to unlock a user account that is already active?

interfaces.name: Lock/Unlock API
interfaces.description: Interface for admins to lock or unlock user accounts via a RESTful API.

interfaces.name: User Management Database
interfaces.description: Stores user account information including status (locked/unlocked).

interfaces.name: User Management Page
interfaces.description: Frontend interface where admins can select and lock/unlock user accounts.

test_cases.description: Admin attempts to lock their own account.
test_cases.expected_result: The system denies the request with a clear error message.

test_cases.description: Simultaneous lock and unlock operations on the same user.
test_cases.expected_result: The last operation takes precedence, and the final status is applied to the user account.

test_cases.description: Unlocking a user account that is already active.
test_cases.expected_result: The system acknowledges the request but does not change the account status.
